2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

500 BIOM - Biometrics

BIOL765 Sociobiology (4 Credits)

Deals with the description and analysis of animal social organizations the adaptive nature of animal societies, the effects of early experience, and the role of communication in the integration of animal groups. Prerequisite: Must have completed a course in behavior.
